positive: A vibrant, geometric pattern featuring stylized tropical leaves and abstract fauna (like hummingbirds and parrots). The pattern should be seamless and highly repeatable, utilizing a limited color palette of turquoise, coral, and deep indigo. Style: Mid-century modern illustration, suitable for textile printing. Flat vector style, clean lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradient, photorealistic
